positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a celestial mountain range at twilight. The mountains are depicted as sharp, clean silhouettes with varying heights, forming a geometric, stylized horizon line. Above the mountains, incorporate a gentle crescent moon and three stylized, scattered constellations (like scattered dots or abstract geometric forms) using varying line weights. The sky should feature soft washes of deep indigo, dusty lavender, and hints of ethereal turquoise, rendered with flat, graphic color blocking. The style should be highly detailed yet clean, suitable for apparel printing. Focus on bold contrast between the black/deep color silhouettes and the vibrant, smooth sky gradient. High contrast, graphic novel style, intricate linework, central composition, perfect symmetry.
